TEXT.source: translation of FormosanBank gitbook in Paiwan
TEXT.citation: Ruan, X. (2025). Paiwan translation of FormosanBank manual.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{gitbook_paiwan_transl, author={Ruan, X.}, title={Paiwan Translation of FormosanBank Manual}, year={2025}, note={Translation}}

S.FORM: tja kipapawlingaven a cekaw tua ziriu imaza
tja kipapawlingaven a cekaw toa zirio imaza
S.TRANSL: 使用條款
Terms of Use

S.FORM: maqati a malaing a macekaw sa sicekaukau tua ziriu itua FormosanBank, ljakua izua matjapida a tjara uli tja sikinemenem.
maqati a malaing a macekaw sa sicekaokao toa zirio itoa FormosanBank, ljakoa izoa matjapida a tjara oli tja sikinemenem.
S.TRANSL: 您可以自由使用和重新發布 FormosanBank 資料，但須遵守 以下限制:
You are free to use and redistribute FormosanBank materials subject to the following restrictions:

S.FORM: maya sinan paveli namaya tua AI a sengsengan
maya sinan paveli namaya toa AI a sengsengan
S.TRANSL: 禁止商業 AI 使用
No Commercial AI Use

S.FORM: aza ziriu a penuljat itua FormosanBank maqati a macekaw itua mareka sengsengan patjara vaquan a kikay, pakicaquan, semeking katua zuma seman AI a kikay a kalakudaing.
aza zirio a penoljat itoa FormosanBank maqati a macekaw itoa mareka sengsengan patjara vaqoan a kikay, pakicaqoan, semeking katoa zoma seman AI a kikay a kalakodaing.
S.TRANSL: FormosanBank 的語料庫或其 衍生作品，不得全部或部分用 於開發、訓練、測試或部署旨 在商業用途的人工智慧系統、 算法或模型。

The corpora of FormosanBank, or any derivative works thereof, may not be used, in whole or in part, for the development, training, testing, or deployment of artificial intelligence systems, algorithms, or models intended for commercial purposes.

S.FORM: ljakua dikinay a macekaw taicu a ziriu itua seman siubay a sengsengan katua nalemingdjelj tua mamaw a pinitua ziriukan itua wanglu.
ljakoa dikinay a macekaw taico a zirio itoa seman siobay a sengsengan katoa nalemingdjelj toa mamaw a pinitoa ziriokan itoa wanglo.
S.TRANSL: 這包括但不限於 旨在生成用於商業目的的文本 或能夠創建與語料庫相同風格 或類型的作品的技術。
This includes, but not limited to, technologies designed to generate text for commercial purposes or capable of creating works in the same style or genre as the corpus.

S.FORM: pakatua ziriu a kinaizuanan
pakatoa zirio a kinaizoanan
S.TRANSL: 來源材料
Source Materials

S.FORM: a isangas a sinipakeljang anga a ziriu kemasi tua kakaizuanan i wanglu. avansika tjara venecik tua kinaizuanan nu macekaw taicu a ziriu. ayatua pasusu tua kakudan katua mareka hulic tucu, kipapuvarung a venecik ta sekeljang a kinaizuanan, ljakua nu neka nu vecik pakatua kinaizuanan, maqati anan venecik ta FormosanBank maitucu a vecik.

a isangas a sinipakeljang anga a zirio kemasi toa kakaizoanan i wanglo. avansika tjara venecik toa kinaizoanan no macekaw taico a zirio. ayatoa pasoso toa kakodan katoa mareka holic toco, kipapovarong a venecik ta sekeljang a kinaizoanan, ljakoa no neka no vecik pakatoa kinaizoanan, maqati anan venecik ta FormosanBank maitoco a vecik.
S.TRANSL: 大部分語料庫來自先前已發布 的來源。若要使用這些資料， 您可能需要引用來源。手冊上 每個語料庫的頁面和每個 XML 文件的根目錄中列出了所需的 引用。若未列出所需引用，則 僅需引用 FormosanBank 本身， 如下所述。若來源資料屬於公 有領域，在法律上雖無需引用 來源，但基於禮貌，建議您應 進行引用。

Most of the corpora are derived from a previously-published source. To use them, you may need to cite the source material. Required citations on listed on the page for each corpus in the manual and also in the root of each XML file. If there is no required citation listed, this means it is sufficient to cite FormosanBank itself, as described below. Where the source material is public domain, you are not legally required to cite the source but you should as common courtesy.

S.FORM: kipapaulingavu aza kindri pakatua macekaw taicu a ziriu, sika pacunu ljemita vinecikan itua qadupu katua pinu i XML a pakeljang.
kipapaolingavo aza kindri pakatoa macekaw taico a zirio, sika pacono ljemita vinecikan itoa qadopo katoa pino i XML a pakeljang.
S.TRANSL: 請注意，許多語料庫的授權包 括額外限制，例如僅允許非商 業用途。來源的授權在手冊的 各語料庫頁面以及每個 XML 文 件的根目錄中有詳細說明。

Note that for many of the corpora, the license includes additional restrictions such as allowing only non-commercial use. The license for the source material is described on the corpus page in the manual for each corpus, as well as in the root of every XML file.

S.FORM: ini amin i vavaw a kai, tjara izuanan a venecik tua FormosanBank maitucu a vecik.
ini amin i vavaw a kai, tjara izoanan a venecik toa FormosanBank maitoco a vecik.
S.TRANSL: 除上述要求外，您還需引用 FormosanBank 本身。
In addition to the above, you are required to cite FormosanBank itself.

S.FORM: maqati a pasusu pakamaza venecikan itua GitHub a qepuqepuan.
maqati a pasoso pakamaza venecikan itoa GitHob a qepoqepoan.
S.TRANSL: 對於代碼 包，您可以引用 GitHub 存儲庫。
For code packages, you may refer to the GitHub repository.

S.FORM: utauta pakatua kakituluan a ziriu, maqati a venecik a maitucu a kai:
otaota pakatoa kakitoloan a zirio, maqati a venecik a maitoco a kai:
S.TRANSL: 對於學術出版物，請引用以下文獻:
For academic publications, you should cite:

S.FORM: kaisiaku katua meta a ziriu
kaisiako katoa meta a zirio
S.TRANSL: 注釋和後設資料
Annotations and Metadata

S.FORM: pakatua kaisiaku katua meta a ziriu seFormosanBank napasusu tua CC-BY-4.0 a hulic, avansika nu macekaw, malang katua seman vaquan a ziriu, tjara maqati a kialap pakamaza venecikan itua GitHub a pinituaziriukan. pakatua kakituluan a ziriu, maqati a venecik a namaitucu a kai:

pakatoa kaisiako katoa meta a zirio seFormosanBank napasoso toa CC-BY-4.0 a holic, avansika no macekaw, malang katoa seman vaqoan a zirio, tjara maqati a kialap pakamaza venecikan itoa GitHob a pinitoaziriokan. pakatoa kakitoloan a zirio, maqati a venecik a namaitoco a kai:
S.TRANSL: FormosanBank 的注釋和後設 資料遵循 CC-BY-4.0，這意味著 您必須在任何再發布或衍生作 品中引用來源。對於代碼包， 您可以引用 GitHub 存儲庫。對 於學術出版物，請引用以下文 獻:

FormosanBank annotations and metadata are CC-BY-4.0. This means you must cite the source in any redistributed or derived products. For code packages, you may refer to the GitHub repository. For academic publications, you should cite:
